parameterdescription.para: true for forward, false for reverse.
True if enabling requires driving pin LOW.
Maximum speed in steps per second.
Number of steps (positive = forward, negative = reverse).

briefdescription.para: Start a move to an absolute position.
Advance the stepper state machine by one tick.

detaileddescription.para: Call from a timer ISR or high-frequency loop. The tick rate should be at least 2× the maximum step rate for proper pulse generation.

briefdescription.para: Emergency stop — immediately halt with no deceleration.
Enable or disable the motor driver.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable, false to disable.

briefdescription.para: Set output adapter for SYN_MotorOutput (ticks the stepper).

parameterdescription.para: Unused — stepper motion is driven by its own commands.

briefdescription.para: Create a SYN_MotorOutput interface for this stepper.

detaileddescription.para: The set_output callback calls syn_stepper_tick(), coast/brake both call syn_stepper_stop(). The motor controller's output value is not used directly — stepper motion is driven by the stepper's own move/move_to commands.

parameterdescription.para: Stepper instance (must outlive the returned output).
